news.title: India's April consumer inflation likely rose to 3.8% as higher fuel costs weigh
news.description: “We expect April headline ⁠inflation to tick up...on higher food and some pass-through of higher global energy prices,” said Rahul Bajoria, head of India and ASEAN economic research, BofA Securities

news.title: Gold Rises as Buying Interest Counters Concern Over Hormuz Clash
news.description: Gold rose as signs of buying interest emerged in the wake of strong purchases by China’s central bank, even as fresh clashes in the Middle East threatened to fracture a fragile ceasefire.

news.title: India's April consumer inflation likely rose to 3.8% as higher fuel costs weigh: Reuters poll
news.description: India’s retail inflation likely rose to 3.8% in April from 3.4% in March as higher fuel and LPG costs linked to the US-Iran conflict started feeding into prices, according to a Reuters poll. Economist

news.title: India demand subdued on higher prices, China premiums hold firm
news.description: Spot gold prices have risen over 2% so far this week on easing fears of inflation ‌and higher interest rates, as investors remained optimistic about a US-Iran peace deal

news.title: 卡位黄金价格带，问界M6向下争夺年轻群体｜最前线
news.description:
2026年的中国新能源SUV市场正经历着前所未有的内卷。
 问界依托华为技术体系，推出了定位更亲民的全新车型 M6， 瞄准主流家用消费群体。放在问界品牌整体销量连续数月下滑、赛力斯盈利能力承压的背景下，M6的到来既是“救兵”，更是一场不容有失的“大考”。
 卡位黄金价格带，向下争夺年轻群体

news.title: 最强「种草」帝国，为何突然加速 AI
news.description:
作者 | 肖思佳
 编辑 | 乔芊 杨轩
 所有互联网大中厂都渴望在AI时代博得位置，在这场比赛中，小红书曾是克制的那个。
 在一个搜索属性与社区属性并存，以真实经验分享为核心的产品中，活人感与AI、温情和算法，始终像天平的两端。
 很长一段时间里，小红书既没有完全缺席技术探索，也没有像许多同行那样高调推进AI产品化。相反，这家公司始终在两股力量的拉锯和平衡中前行：一边持续投入模型能力，一边谨慎控

news.title: Silver gains Rs 2,361, gold near Rs 1.53 lakh amid hopes of Iran peace talks. What should investors do?

news.title: Plaud获头部大厂投资，目前估值达20亿美元｜硬氪独家
news.description:
作者｜黄楠 周鑫雨
 编辑｜袁斯来 杨轩
 硬氪独家获悉，AI卡片录音笔公司Plaud已于2025年年中拿下腾讯的融资，估值达10亿美元；目前，Plaud公司估值已涨至约20亿美元。同时，硬氪从相关人士处了解到，Plaud正在推进与腾讯会议之间的硬件合作。
 有关上述信息，硬氪向Plaud及腾讯方面求证，双方均表示消息不实。
 一名接近Plaud人士告诉硬氪，Plaud在2024年的总营收约560
